description: Eval cases for testing practices: coverage, assertions, isolation, mocking, flaky tests

cases.name: Untested error path
cases.description: Error handling code without test coverage

cases.name: Weak test assertions
cases.description: Test with insufficient or overly broad assertions
cases.code_snippet:
def test_user_creation():
    user = create_user('john@example.com', 'password123')
    assert user is not None
    assert user  # Too broad
    assert isinstance(user, User)
    # Missing specific assertions about email, password, created_at, etc.

cases.name: Test with shared mutable state
cases.description: Tests modifying shared state causing interdependencies

cases.name: Test making real external calls
cases.description: Test calling real database instead of using mocks
cases.code_snippet:
def test_get_user():
    # Makes real database call - slow and fragile
    user = get_user_from_db(1)
    assert user.name == 'John'
    assert user.email == 'john@example.com'
    # Database might be down, test is unreliable

cases.name: Time-dependent test
cases.description: Test with race condition or timing dependency
cases.code_snippet:
def test_async_operation():
    result = async_function()
    time.sleep(0.1)  # Unreliable - might not be enough
    assert result.is_complete == True
    assert result.status == 'SUCCESS'

async def test_concurrent_requests():
    tasks = [make_request() for _ in range(10)]
    asyncio.sleep(0.5)  # Magic number, fragile
    assert all(t.done() for t in tasks)

cases.name: Well-structured unit test
cases.description: Properly isolated test with clear setup and assertions
cases.code_snippet:
def test_user_creation_with_valid_email():
    # Arrange
    email = 'test@example.com'
    password = 'secure_password123'
    
    # Act
    user = create_user(email, password)
    
    # Assert
    assert user.id is not None
    assert user.email == email
    assert user.is_active == True
    assert user.created_at is not None
